title: Board Pack
subtitle: Annual board-pack aggregator (FN-258)
description: Composite annual snapshot composed from published report versions, YoY comparisons, and disclosure-note summaries. Owner and Auditor roles only.

role_gate.title: Access restricted
role_gate.description: The board pack is available to Owner and Auditor roles only. Contact your Owner if you need access.

empty.title: No published reports for this fiscal year
empty.description: Publish at least one report version for the selected fiscal year to populate the board pack.

empty_section.yoy: No comparable metrics across the two fiscal years.
empty_section.disclosures: No disclosure-note runs published this fiscal year.

errors.invalid_year: Fiscal year must be an integer between 2000 and 2100.
